howItWorks.subtitle: From request to live website in a few simple steps.

billing.label: Billing
billing.title: About billing
billing.intro: We follow an advance payment policy: work is invoiced before the project is delivered to the client, once the proposal has been accepted. This commits both the client and the supplier to the project.
billing.basics: As soon as the project begins, we reserve time in our calendar for that work. If the client cancels mid-project or disappears, we may lose the opportunity to take on other work for the same period. That is why the advance payment acts as a reservation fee that ensures the client is committed to the project.
points: Reserves your slot in our calendar

form.title: Request more information
form.subtitle: Leave your email and we'll contact you within 24 hours.
form.name: Name

planOptions.general: Not sure yet / I want advice

form.privacy: By submitting you agree to be contacted about your request. We don't share your data with third parties.
form.successMessage: We've saved your request and sent you a confirmation email. We'll contact you within 24 hours.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

items.question: What's included in the dashboard?
items.answer: The website admin panel is the interface through which you maintain your site's content, settings, domain and security. We build a customised interface tailored to your business needs, where you manage clients, appointments, orders, statistics and more according to your plan. Accessible from any device.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: 7-10 days for Essential, 12-15 days for Professional and 3-4 weeks for Premium, once we receive your content.

items.question: Can I upgrade later?
items.answer: Yes. You can start with Essential and add modules or upgrade to a higher plan when needed.

items.question: Is domain and hosting included?
items.answer: Yes, the first year of hosting and SSL certificate are included in all plans. We help you with the domain. From the second year onwards, hosting costs approximately €12–17/month and domain renewal around €10–15/year (depending on extension, e.g. .com or .fi). You can stay with us or move the site to your own hosting — everything remains yours.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: We use advance payment: work is invoiced before project delivery, once the proposal is accepted. When the project starts we reserve calendar time for your work. The advance acts as a reservation that commits both parties and ensures your commitment to the project.

items.question: Can I update the website myself?
items.answer: Yes. Depending on your plan, we include a simple panel to edit text, images and basic content without technical knowledge. We can also make changes for you if you prefer.
